_instructions: Dhaba - Estd 1986 Delhi — R-303A, 3rd Floor, Ambience Mall, Near Ambience Island, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram.
Menu extracted from 13 menu page photos: Shorba, Starters (veg+non-veg), Platters, Mains, Rice/Pulao, Sides, Breads.

restaurants.name: Dhaba - Estd 1986 Delhi
restaurants.address: R-303A, 3rd Floor, Ambience Mall, Near Ambience Island, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
